clusters.justification: These terms reliably co-activate within the extended corticolimbic and autonomic systems, reflecting the overarching macro-functional axis of processing emotional valence and physiological arousal.

These concepts map onto frontostriatal and dopaminergic pathways, representing the broad cognitive domain of computing incentives, predicting outcomes, and utilizing reward to drive motivated decision-making.

Grounded largely in default mode network co-activations, these terms represent the high-level cognitive domain of generating internal referential models to navigate both the self and the minds of others.
